args.query: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c LIMIT 20;

args.query:
SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS assigned_cases
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate < '2023-09-03'
GROUP BY newvalue__c
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) > 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS assigned_cases
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate < '2023-09-03'
GROUP BY newvalue__c
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) > 1;

args.query:
SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS num_cases
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND ch.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND ch.createddate < '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casehistory__c ch2 WHERE ch2.caseid__c = ch.caseid__c AND ch2.field__c = 'Owner Assignment') = 1
GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS num_cases
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND ch.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND ch.createddate < '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casehistory__c ch2 WHERE ch2.caseid__c = ch.caseid__c AND ch2.field__c = 'Owner Assignment') = 1
GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 10;

args.query:
SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, c.createddate, c.closeddate,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casehistory__c ch2 WHERE ch2.caseid__c = ch.caseid__c AND ch2.field__c = 'Owner Assignment') AS owner_assignment_count
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND ch.newvalue__c = '005Wt000003NDqDIAW'
  AND ch.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND ch.createddate < '2023-09-03';

args.query:
SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id,
       ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
       c.createddate,
       c.closeddate,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casehistory__c ch2 WHERE ch2.caseid__c = ch.caseid__c AND ch2.field__c = 'Owner Assignment') AS owner_assignment_count
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND ch.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND ch.createddate < '2023-09-03'
ORDER BY ch.newvalue__c, ch.caseid__c
LIMIT 500;

args.query:
WITH eligible AS (
  SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS assigned_cases
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate < '2023-09-03'
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) > 1
)
SELECT e.agent_id,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS num_closed_nontransferred_cases
FROM eligible e
JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.newvalue__c = e.agent_id AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND ch.createddate < '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casehistory__c ch2 WHERE ch2.caseid__c = ch.caseid__c AND ch2.field__c = 'Owner Assignment') = 1
GROUP BY e.agent_id
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH eligible AS (
  SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS assigned_cases
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate < '2023-09-03'
  GROUP BY newvalue__c
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) > 1
)
SELECT e.agent_id,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_seconds,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS num_closed_nontransferred_cases
FROM eligible e
JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.newvalue__c = e.agent_id AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND ch.createddate < '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM casehistory__c ch2 WHERE ch2.caseid__c = ch.caseid__c AND ch2.field__c = 'Owner Assignment') = 1
GROUP BY e.agent_id
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
